title: Implement URL Shortener REST API in Go

steps.description: Create domain model for URLs, including properties for original URL and shortened URL, along with the logic for shortening and retrieving URLs.
steps.done_condition: Domain model and logic are implemented and unit tested.

steps.description: Define port interfaces for URL shortening and retrieval operations to interact with the domain logic.
steps.done_condition: Port interfaces are defined and documented.

steps.description: Implement REST API endpoints for shortening URLs and retrieving shortened URLs using the defined port interfaces.
steps.done_condition: REST API for URL shortening is implemented and functional.

steps.description: Set up in-memory storage solution for URLs, implementing persistence within the application lifecycle.
steps.done_condition: In-memory storage is set up and integrated with the domain logic.

steps.description: Test the full integration of the URL shortener API, including unit and integration tests for the implemented features.
steps.done_condition: All integration tests pass successfully for the URL shortener API.

successCriteria: Working URL shortener API with endpoints for shortening and retrieving URLs.
All features meet acceptance criteria and pass tests.
